params.name: Tara Statue
params.description:
On Jan 9, 784 AD, a statue of Tara was cast.
This gold-plated bronze statue, with South Asian features on its face, is made entirely of solid bronze, which is rare for statues of its time. Standing at three-quarters the height of a real person, the craftsmanship required to create such an elegant shape with smooth lines is extraordinary. This statue is a rare work of art.
